rollingHandoffIn: David and Menendez are still in a standoff. David has just yelled at Menendez to pull it together. The music continues.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave, David.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

parsed.summary: Menendez taunts David about the difficulty of killing an idea versus a man. David retorts that Menendez was never meant to be a Mason and declares that their conflict ends now.
